title: Creative Co-Op Floral Hand Stamped Stoneware Measuring Cups (Set of 4 Sizes/Designs)
description:
About this item
Measuring cups in four sizes: 1.5 cups, 1 cup, 1/2 cup, and 3/4 cup
Hand stamped in a floral pattern of various colors
Both usable and a décor item
Made from stoneware
Microwave, oven, and dishwasher safe
reviews_5s:
These measuring cups are beautifully made. Mine came well packaged.These measuring cups are really pretty and will brighten up your cooking! I bought these for a gift for my granddaughter who is just setting up her first apartment!!Very cute. Exactly what I was hoping for
Good quality and priceEasy to clean. Pretty in the kitchen. Can use to melt butter in microwave. Love the pour spout!These measuring cups are so beautiful that I display them on my kitchen countertopMy wife loves these little guys.
She's the boss and she's happy.Love my measuring cups. Bought some as gifts as well.I had these as a baby shower prize option for a baby shower I hosted recently. Everyone oohed and aaahed over them. These are a great gift idea, especially for the price point.We use these in many different situations. And they are so cute.These are truly the most beautiful measuring cups I've ever seen!!!
reviews_1s:
I love the look of these measuring cups, but they just aren’t practical.
When you pour liquid, it spills all over the edges - even if you pour very slowly and evenly. It’s super annoying. I can’t use them for cooking.
Also, you won’t get precise measurements because you have to fill it to the rim and that’s very difficult to do.
I would return them but it’s been too long. :-( Maybe I will repurpose them because they really are cute.I thought I was ordering mixing bowl. Regular size.
These look like small, tiny little bowls.
No way I can make or mix anything in these bowls.I received my order today. It was missing the 1/4 measuring cup altogether and the painting on the cups was nothing like the picture provided. Very disappointing.Arrived broken. Disappointing.
